Drop is automatic when out of scope"}]}]]}]}]}],"\n",["$","$L17",null,{"level":3,"id":"compile-time-safety","children":"Compile-Time Safety"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Type errors caught at compile time:"}],"\n",["$","$L18",null,{"className":"shiki shiki-themes github-light mismatch"}]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#D73A49","--shiki-dark":"#F97583"},"children":"let"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":"
